calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF LEELANAU HOLDINGS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal on file.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Continued To May-17-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFENDANT'S MASON STREET AFFORDABLE HOUSING L.P'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Skye Langs, 415.772.5785 of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP appearing in person for Defendant Mason Street Affordable Housing, L.P.
Robert Kaplan, Jeffer Mangles Butler & Mitchell LLP appearing via Zoom for Plaitniff Leelanau Holdings, LLC.

Hearing held. Ms. Lang objects to the $139,945.61 that the Defendant is ordered to pay the Plaintiff. In addition, she states the amount cannot be paid by 5:00 p.m. today.
Mr. Kaplan states that the plaintiff is owed $40,000 more that the tentative grants his client.

Ms. Lang requests supplemental briefing re: accounting of attorney's fees and states that the defendant deserves a chance to challenge the amount. Ms. Land objects to Kevin Singer as a potential receiver and wants to suggest someone else. She wants to appoint a rents & profit receiver and not a full scope receiver with too much unlimited power.

The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF LEELANAU HOLDINGS LLC'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is Granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
